verdict.biggestBlocker: None blocking for a fixture; live mode would need concrete API contracts.
verdict.summary: A team could build the described fixture pipeline as written. The persist contract and store interface are specified. Data shapes are defined. The gate loop policy is deterministic and testable.

gaps.title: Persist error contract
gaps.problem: The persist route returns ok/false but the error taxonomy is not enumerated.
gaps.whyItBlocks: Callers cannot branch on specific failure types.
gaps.fix: Document the error strings the persist route can return.

scopeRisks.recommendation: Keep it deferred to Phase 2 as stated.

revisionBrief.instruction: Note that the read path is intentionally deferred.
